project.title: Wasteland Survivors
project.description: Post-apocalyptic survival game set in ruined cities overtaken by mutated wildlife.
project.art_direction: gritty stylized 2D game art, muted desaturated palette with rust and toxic green accents, thick readable silhouettes

asset.name: raptor_scavenger_idle
asset.action: subtle idle breathing animation, slight chest rise and fall, tail sway, head micro-movements, standing in place, loopable, side view facing right

negative_hints: Never generate a multi-frame spritesheet from one image prompt.
Preferred path: reference still → video → split frames → video matte-frames (AI).

pipeline.note: character reference still (must pass pure-white validate)

pipeline.prompt: Mutated velociraptor scavenger idle animation: subtle breathing with chest rise/fall, gentle tail sway, and small head movements. Standing in place, side view facing right. Smooth loopable motion on pure white background.

plan.video_prompt: Mutated velociraptor scavenger idle animation: subtle breathing with chest rise/fall, gentle tail sway, and small head movements. Standing in place, side view facing right. Smooth loopable motion on pure white background.
